TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 'ayaw, mifatel ko ca'ang no kilang i cahong no loma'. Orasaka manga'ay caay to ka roray talalotok a mikasoy, matiya o caleng a kilan (Iwatan sawol: hal-mut), matiniay a kilang malengaw i liyok no loma' no Iwatan, maolah ko tamdaw, orasaka, rahodayen ko tamdaw a mikasoy, nikawrira, anini sa caay to ka lengaw i lawad no lomaloma' a han? Matini:ay aca, itiya ho, ira ko cecay fafahiyan no Iwatan, itira i loma' a mitenooy itiya, ira ko ma'icangay a kilang mamiliay micomod i laloma', masamatira, makari'ang koya ni tenooyan noya fafahiyan saka, tada mainget koya fafahiyan toya kilang a Lukis, pasainget sa toya Lukis a kilang, ma'adangen to kina kilang to ka'inget noya fafahiyan to ka Bu√įongbu√įon, ikor pasowal haca ko nia fafahiyan to: "Kamu-Kaing_Misuma" (Aka to ka tayni kiso to ikor) , "Mulana" (pinokay to) sanay. Itiya pakatengil koya kilang i mainget to, saka pafeliaw ako to karorayan no tamdaw sato, a matiya o nia hal-mut ko piliyas to Iwatan a tamdaw, haki anini, tayra to i lotolotokan ko aro' sato, sa cisowal sato toya fafahiyan: "haki anini, ano miala ho kamo to Sang a malakasoy i, seti'en ako ko taker namo." saan. (Midotoc, oya mi'orongay to Sang a kilang a tamdaw, pasowal sa, ano mi'orongay to Sang kareteng to, kahemaw to, oya taker (Mamuku) adada to 3-7 a romi'ad saan). Orasaka o kina cecay a mi'orong i, mapatodongay to pi'ekak (Singaska√į) no Sang a kilang, maseti' a tekar, matiya o ci salo'afangay kina kilang). Matiniay a kilang, o kalokelon no tamdaw a maro', saka caay to ko talalotok ko ka'orip, talacowa no tamdaw ko pi'arawan to kaicowa no 'orip, ira aca ko pico'ay no niyah, o kifetolay ko podac no matiniay a kilang, caay ka talaw to nika todoh, ano misaomah a mitodoh i, matiniay a kilang matodotodoh ko podac i, o pipaco'ay (Hal-mut) no tamdaw, caay ka sapinang a nengnengan ko na no matodohay cira i 'ayaw, orasaka ano maseping no tamdaw cira i, o caci kadit ko tatirengan nira. 'atekak ko Tul-mus (caleng) a kilang, manga'ay sapipatireng to loma', naitiya malaplap noya fafahiya i, tayra to cira i tono' no lotok a malengaw. Naitiyaan i, maraay to ko pialaan no Iwatan to matiniay a kilang to sapisaloma', romasato, o nika 'atekak no matiniay a kilang, tona miletek ko Iwatan to nia kilang, mangici' aca ko fonos nangra. O matiniay a Sang-Hava ato Havu-ta√į kilang i, o safangcalay kalo kasoyen a kilang, nikawrira na itiyaan i, sapialaan to Iwatan to matiniay a kilang, o tatayra i maraay a tokos a lotok ko pialaan, matiniay a kilang kareteng a orongen. O ngaloay a papah no Lan-dun i, manga'ayay kaenen, itiniay ho i liyok no niyaro' ko lengaw no Lan-dun a kilang, kainget han no fafahiyan no Iwatan laliw sato a miraay ko ka'oripan, orasaka anini sa, o tatayra to maraayay ko pialaan, maroray ko rakat a mikilim miala to papah nira. Pakayni to nia kimad, pasifana' titaanan nawiro malengaw itira i tokotokosan no lotok, o lietecay awaayay ko fali a kaitiraan. Mitiliday, o Iwatan (Bunun) tak-banua√į ngasaw, ci Sauli Tanapima (taki-kosalan). Mafalicay to sowal no 'Amis, ci Masao Nikar.
S.PHON: i °ajaw, mifat…ô…ĺ ko~u ¶a °aŇč no~u ki…ĺaŇč i ¶ańßo~uŇč no~u …ĺo~uma °. o~urasaka maŇča °aj ¶aaj to~u ka ro~uraj ta…ĺa…ĺo~uto~uk a mikaso~uj, matija o~u ¶a…ĺ…ôŇč a ki…ĺan (iwatan sawo~u…ĺ: ńßa…ĺ-mo~u~ut), matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč ma…ĺ…ôŇčaw i …ĺijo~uk no~u …ĺo~uma ° no~u iwatan, mao~u…ĺańß ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw, o~urasaka, rańßo~u…¨~…ģaj…ôn ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a mikaso~uj, nikawrira, anini sa ¶aaj to~u ka …ĺ…ôŇčaw i …ĺawa…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma…ĺo~uma ° a ńßan? matini:aj a ¶a, itija ńßo~u, ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj fafańßijan no~u iwatan, itira i …ĺo~uma ° a mit…ôno~uo~uj itija, ira ko~u ma °i ¶aŇčaj a ki…ĺaŇč mami…ĺiaj mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i …ĺa…ĺo~uma °, masamatira, makari °aŇč ko~uja ni t…ôno~uo~ujan no~uja fafańßijan saka, ta…¨~…ģa maiŇč…ôt ko~uja fafańßijan to~uja ki…ĺaŇč a …ĺo~u~ukis, pasaiŇč…ôt sa to~uja …ĺo~u~ukis a ki…ĺaŇč, ma °a…¨~…ģaŇč…ôn to~u kina ki…ĺaŇč to~u ka °iŇč…ôt no~uja fafańßijan to~u ka b~b~vo~u~u*o~uŇčb~b~vo~u~u*o~un, iko~ur paso~uwa…ĺ ńßa ¶a ko~u nia fafańßijan to~u: "kamo~u~u-kaiŇč_miso~u~uma" (aka to~u ka tajni kiso~u to~u iko~ur) , "mo~u~u…ĺana" (pino~ukaj to~u) sanaj. itija pakat…ôŇči…ĺ ko~uja ki…ĺaŇč i maiŇč…ôt to~u, saka paf…ô…ĺiaw ako~u to~u karo~urajan no~u tam…¨~…ģaw sato~u, a matija o~u nia ńßa…ĺ-mo~u~ut ko~u pi…ĺijas to~u iwatan a tam…¨~…ģaw, ńßaki anini, tajra to~u i …ĺo~uto~u…ĺo~uto~ukan ko~u aro~u ° sato~u, sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sato~u to~uja fafańßijan: "ńßaki anini, ano~u mia…ĺa ńßo~u kamo~u to~u saŇč a ma…ĺakaso~uj i, s…ôti °…ôn ako~u ko~u tak…ôr namo~u." saan. (mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶, o~uja mi °o~uro~uŇčaj to~u saŇč a ki…ĺaŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw, paso~uwa…ĺ sa, ano~u mi °o~uro~uŇčaj to~u saŇč kar…ôt…ôŇč to~u, kańß…ômaw to~u, o~uja tak…ôr (mamo~u~uko~u~u) a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u *-* a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ saan). o~urasaka o~u kina ¶…ô ¶aj a mi °o~uro~uŇč i, mapato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u pi °…ôkak (siŇčaska*) no~u saŇč a ki…ĺaŇč, mas…ôti ° a t…ôkar, matija o~u ¶i sa…ĺo~u °afaŇčaj kina ki…ĺaŇč). matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč, o~u ka…ĺo~uk…ô…ĺo~un no~u tam…¨~…ģaw a maro~u °, saka ¶aaj to~u ko~u ta…ĺa…ĺo~uto~uk ko~u ka °o~urip, ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u pi °arawan to~u kai ¶o~uwa no~u °o~urip, ira a ¶a ko~u pi ¶o~u °aj no~u nijańß, o~u kif…ôto~u…ĺaj ko~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ no~u matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč, ¶aaj ka ta…ĺaw to~u nika to~u…¨~…ģo~uńß, ano~u misao~umańß a mito~u…¨~…ģo~uńß i, matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč mato~u…¨~…ģo~uto~u…¨~…ģo~uńß ko~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ i, o~u pipa ¶o~u °aj (ńßa…ĺ-mo~u~ut) no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ¶aaj ka sapinaŇč a n…ôŇčn…ôŇčan ko~u na no~u mato~u…¨~…ģo~uńßaj ¶ira i °ajaw, o~urasaka ano~u mas…ôpiŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ¶ira i, o~u ¶a ¶i ka…¨~…ģit ko~u tatir…ôŇčan nira. °at…ôkak ko~u to~u~u…ĺ-mo~u~us ( ¶a…ĺ…ôŇč) a ki…ĺaŇč, maŇča °aj sapipatir…ôŇč to~u …ĺo~uma °, naitija ma…ĺap…ĺap no~uja fafańßija i, tajra to~u ¶ira i to~uno~u ° no~u …ĺo~uto~uk a ma…ĺ…ôŇčaw. naitijaan i, maraaj to~u ko~u pia…ĺaan no~u iwatan to~u matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč to~u sapisa…ĺo~uma °, ro~umasato~u, o~u nika °at…ôkak no~u matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč, to~una mi…ĺ…ôt…ôk ko~u iwatan to~u nia ki…ĺaŇč, maŇči ¶i ° a ¶a ko~u fo~uno~us naŇčra. o~u matiniaj a saŇč-ńßab~va ato~u ńßab~vo~u~u-ta* ki…ĺaŇč i, o~u safaŇč ¶a…ĺaj ka…ĺo~u kaso~uj…ôn a ki…ĺaŇč, nikawrira na itijaan i, sapia…ĺaan to~u iwatan to~u matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč, o~u tatajra i maraaj a to~uko~us a …ĺo~uto~uk ko~u pia…ĺaan, matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč kar…ôt…ôŇč a o~uro~uŇč…ôn. o~u Ňča…ĺo~uaj a papańß no~u …ĺan-…¨~…ģo~u~un i, maŇča °ajaj ka…ôn…ôn, itiniaj ńßo~u i …ĺijo~uk no~u nijaro~u ° ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u …ĺan-…¨~…ģo~u~un a ki…ĺaŇč, kaiŇč…ôt ńßan no~u fafańßijan no~u iwatan …ĺa…ĺiw sato~u a miraaj ko~u ka °o~uripan, o~urasaka anini sa, o~u tatajra to~u maraajaj ko~u pia…ĺaan, maro~uraj ko~u rakat a miki…ĺim mia…ĺa to~u papańß nira. pakajni to~u nia kima…¨~…ģ, pasifana ° titaanan nawiro~u ma…ĺ…ôŇčaw itira i to~uko~uto~uko~usan no~u …ĺo~uto~uk, o~u …ĺi…ôt…ô ¶aj awaajaj ko~u fa…ĺi a kaitiraan. miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj, o~u iwatan (b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un) tak-b~b~vano~u~ua* Ňčasaw, ¶i sao~u~u…ĺi tanapima (taki-ko~usa…ĺan). mafa…ĺi ¶aj to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis, ¶i masao~u nikar.
S.FORM: I 'ayaw, mifatel ko ca'ang no kilang i cahong no loma'. Orasaka manga'ay caay to ka roray talalotok a mikasoy, matiya o caleng a kilan (Iwatan sawol: hal-mut), matiniay a kilang malengaw i liyok no loma' no Iwatan, maolah ko tamdaw, orasaka, rahodayen ko tamdaw a mikasoy, nikawrira, anini sa caay to ka lengaw i lawad no lomaloma' a han? Matini:ay aca, itiya ho, ira ko cecay fafahiyan no Iwatan, itira i loma' a mitenooy itiya, ira ko ma'icangay a kilang mamiliay micomod i laloma', masamatira, makari'ang koya ni tenooyan noya fafahiyan saka, tada mainget koya fafahiyan toya kilang a Lukis, pasainget sa toya Lukis a kilang, ma'adangen to kina kilang to ka'inget noya fafahiyan to ka Bu√įongbu√įon, ikor pasowal haca ko nia fafahiyan to: "Kamu-Kaing_Misuma" (Aka to ka tayni kiso to ikor) , "Mulana" (pinokay to) sanay. Itiya pakatengil koya kilang i mainget to, saka pafeliaw ako to karorayan no tamdaw sato, a matiya o nia hal-mut ko piliyas to Iwatan a tamdaw, haki anini, tayra to i lotolotokan ko aro' sato, sa cisowal sato toya fafahiyan: "haki anini, ano miala ho kamo to Sang a malakasoy i, seti'en ako ko taker namo." saan. (Midotoc, oya mi'orongay to Sang a kilang a tamdaw, pasowal sa, ano mi'orongay to Sang kareteng to, kahemaw to, oya taker (Mamuku) adada to 3-7 a romi'ad saan). Orasaka o kina cecay a mi'orong i, mapatodongay to pi'ekak (Singaska√į) no Sang a kilang, maseti' a tekar, matiya o ci salo'afangay kina kilang). Matiniay a kilang, o kalokelon no tamdaw a maro', saka caay to ko talalotok ko ka'orip, talacowa no tamdaw ko pi'arawan to kaicowa no 'orip, ira aca ko pico'ay no niyah, o kifetolay ko podac no matiniay a kilang, caay ka talaw to nika todoh, ano misaomah a mitodoh i, matiniay a kilang matodotodoh ko podac i, o pipaco'ay (Hal-mut) no tamdaw, caay ka sapinang a nengnengan ko na no matodohay cira i 'ayaw, orasaka ano maseping no tamdaw cira i, o caci kadit ko tatirengan nira. 'atekak ko Tul-mus (caleng) a kilang, manga'ay sapipatireng to loma', naitiya malaplap noya fafahiya i, tayra to cira i tono' no lotok a malengaw. Naitiyaan i, maraay to ko pialaan no Iwatan to matiniay a kilang to sapisaloma', romasato, o nika 'atekak no matiniay a kilang, tona miletek ko Iwatan to nia kilang, mangici' aca ko fonos nangra. O matiniay a Sang-Hava ato Havu-ta√į kilang i, o safangcalay kalo kasoyen a kilang, nikawrira na itiyaan i, sapialaan to Iwatan to matiniay a kilang, o tatayra i maraay a tokos a lotok ko pialaan, matiniay a kilang kareteng a orongen. O ngaloay a papah no Lan-dun i, manga'ayay kaenen, itiniay ho i liyok no niyaro' ko lengaw no Lan-dun a kilang, kainget han no fafahiyan no Iwatan laliw sato a miraay ko ka'oripan, orasaka anini sa, o tatayra to maraayay ko pialaan, maroray ko rakat a mikilim miala to papah nira. Pakayni to nia kimad, pasifana' titaanan nawiro malengaw itira i tokotokosan no lotok, o lietecay awaayay ko fali a kaitiraan. Mitiliday, o Iwatan (Bunun) tak-banua√į ngasaw, ci Sauli Tanapima (taki-kosalan). Mafalicay to sowal no 'Amis, ci Masao Nikar.
S.PHON: i °ajaw, mifat…ô…ĺ ko~u ¶a °aŇč no~u ki…ĺaŇč i ¶ańßo~uŇč no~u …ĺo~uma °. o~urasaka maŇča °aj ¶aaj to~u ka ro~uraj ta…ĺa…ĺo~uto~uk a mikaso~uj, matija o~u ¶a…ĺ…ôŇč a ki…ĺan (iwatan sawo~u…ĺ: ńßa…ĺ-mo~u~ut), matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč ma…ĺ…ôŇčaw i …ĺijo~uk no~u …ĺo~uma ° no~u iwatan, mao~u…ĺańß ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw, o~urasaka, rańßo~u…¨~…ģaj…ôn ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a mikaso~uj, nikawrira, anini sa ¶aaj to~u ka …ĺ…ôŇčaw i …ĺawa…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma…ĺo~uma ° a ńßan? matini:aj a ¶a, itija ńßo~u, ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶aj fafańßijan no~u iwatan, itira i …ĺo~uma ° a mit…ôno~uo~uj itija, ira ko~u ma °i ¶aŇčaj a ki…ĺaŇč mami…ĺiaj mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i …ĺa…ĺo~uma °, masamatira, makari °aŇč ko~uja ni t…ôno~uo~ujan no~uja fafańßijan saka, ta…¨~…ģa maiŇč…ôt ko~uja fafańßijan to~uja ki…ĺaŇč a …ĺo~u~ukis, pasaiŇč…ôt sa to~uja …ĺo~u~ukis a ki…ĺaŇč, ma °a…¨~…ģaŇč…ôn to~u kina ki…ĺaŇč to~u ka °iŇč…ôt no~uja fafańßijan to~u ka b~b~vo~u~u*o~uŇčb~b~vo~u~u*o~un, iko~ur paso~uwa…ĺ ńßa ¶a ko~u nia fafańßijan to~u: "kamo~u~u-kaiŇč_miso~u~uma" (aka to~u ka tajni kiso~u to~u iko~ur) , "mo~u~u…ĺana" (pino~ukaj to~u) sanaj. itija pakat…ôŇči…ĺ ko~uja ki…ĺaŇč i maiŇč…ôt to~u, saka paf…ô…ĺiaw ako~u to~u karo~urajan no~u tam…¨~…ģaw sato~u, a matija o~u nia ńßa…ĺ-mo~u~ut ko~u pi…ĺijas to~u iwatan a tam…¨~…ģaw, ńßaki anini, tajra to~u i …ĺo~uto~u…ĺo~uto~ukan ko~u aro~u ° sato~u, sa ¶iso~uwa…ĺ sato~u to~uja fafańßijan: "ńßaki anini, ano~u mia…ĺa ńßo~u kamo~u to~u saŇč a ma…ĺakaso~uj i, s…ôti °…ôn ako~u ko~u tak…ôr namo~u." saan. (mi…¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶, o~uja mi °o~uro~uŇčaj to~u saŇč a ki…ĺaŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw, paso~uwa…ĺ sa, ano~u mi °o~uro~uŇčaj to~u saŇč kar…ôt…ôŇč to~u, kańß…ômaw to~u, o~uja tak…ôr (mamo~u~uko~u~u) a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa to~u *-* a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ saan). o~urasaka o~u kina ¶…ô ¶aj a mi °o~uro~uŇč i, mapato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u pi °…ôkak (siŇčaska*) no~u saŇč a ki…ĺaŇč, mas…ôti ° a t…ôkar, matija o~u ¶i sa…ĺo~u °afaŇčaj kina ki…ĺaŇč). matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč, o~u ka…ĺo~uk…ô…ĺo~un no~u tam…¨~…ģaw a maro~u °, saka ¶aaj to~u ko~u ta…ĺa…ĺo~uto~uk ko~u ka °o~urip, ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u pi °arawan to~u kai ¶o~uwa no~u °o~urip, ira a ¶a ko~u pi ¶o~u °aj no~u nijańß, o~u kif…ôto~u…ĺaj ko~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ no~u matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč, ¶aaj ka ta…ĺaw to~u nika to~u…¨~…ģo~uńß, ano~u misao~umańß a mito~u…¨~…ģo~uńß i, matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč mato~u…¨~…ģo~uto~u…¨~…ģo~uńß ko~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ i, o~u pipa ¶o~u °aj (ńßa…ĺ-mo~u~ut) no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ¶aaj ka sapinaŇč a n…ôŇčn…ôŇčan ko~u na no~u mato~u…¨~…ģo~uńßaj ¶ira i °ajaw, safaŇč ¶a…ĺaj ka…ĺo~u kaso~uj…ôn a ki…ĺaŇč, nikawrira na itijaan i, sapia…ĺaan to~u iwatan to~u matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč, o~u tatajra i maraaj a to~uko~us a …ĺo~uto~uk ko~u pia…ĺaan, matiniaj a ki…ĺaŇč kar…ôt…ôŇč a o~uro~uŇč…ôn. o~u Ňča…ĺo~uaj a papańß no~u …ĺan-…¨~…ģo~u~un i, maŇča °ajaj ka…ôn…ôn, itiniaj ńßo~u i …ĺijo~uk no~u nijaro~u ° ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u …ĺan-…¨~…ģo~u~un a ki…ĺaŇč, kaiŇč…ôt ńßan no~u fafańßijan no~u iwatan …ĺa…ĺiw sato~u a miraaj ko~u ka °o~uripan, o~urasaka anini sa, o~u tatajra to~u maraajaj ko~u pia…ĺaan, maro~uraj ko~u rakat a miki…ĺim mia…ĺa to~u papańß nira. pakajni to~u nia kima…¨~…ģ, pasifana ° titaanan nawiro~u ma…ĺ…ôŇčaw itira i to~uko~uto~uko~usan no~u …ĺo~uto~uk, o~u …ĺi…ôt…ô ¶aj awaajaj ko~u fa…ĺi a kaitiraan. miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj, o~u iwatan (b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un) tak-b~b~vano~u~ua* Ňčasaw, ¶i sao~u~u…ĺi tanapima (taki-ko~usa…ĺan). mafa…ĺi ¶aj to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u °amis, ¶i masao~u nikar.
